field.label: Enable antivirus proxy
field.help: This will activate the integrated c-icap and ClamAV proxy scanner.

field.label: Max scan size
field.help: Maximum ICAP object size to scan, for example 5M.

field.label: Scan engines/features
field.help: Select ClamAV scan features to enable.

field.label: ICAP file types
field.help: Select c-icap file type categories passed to virus_scan.
